title: Chef Aid 12 Inch Spoon, Perfect for home Baking and Cooking, Crafted with a oval spoon edge for ease of use and sourced from well managed forests, Non Stick Friendly Kitchen Essential
features: ESSENTIAL: Our Chef Aid Wooden Spoon is a basic yet essential kitchen tool that should be in every cook's arsenal; Made from sensibly sourced wood, this wooden spoon is a timeless addition to any kitchen

NON-STICK FRIENDLY: The wooden construction of our spoon makes it ideal for use on non-stick surfaces, as it won't scratch or damage the coating; This makes it a versatile tool for all kinds of cooking, from sautéing to baking
SENSIBLY SOURCED WOOD: We believe in responsible sourcing and have carefully selected wood that is both durable and responsibly harvested
EASY TO CLEAN: To keep our Chef Aid Wooden Spoon in top condition, simply hand wash with warm water and mild soap; Avoid soaking or putting it in the dishwasher

IDEAL FOR BAKING: Our wooden spoon is ideal for baking, as it won't react with acidic ingredients like metal utensils can; Use it to mix dough, fold in ingredients, or scrape the sides of a mixing bowl.
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
